The source material is a script for a YouTube video. The video you generate will act as a draft for that script. The content of the script must be preserved exactly and presented verbatim by the narrator in the generated video. 

The contents of the script should be presented word for word accross scenes with relevant visual elements to help drive home the points being made. The video should be structured in a way that they can be easily followed by someone who has not read the script, and include all of the content from the script verbatim. 

The idea is that people can watch this video to review the content before a more polished video is made. The video should be easy to understand and visually engaging, while also accurately representing the content of the script verbatim.

IMPORTANT: The script needs to be read verbatim by the narrator in the generated video. Do not change any of the wording in the script, and make sure that all of the content from the script is included in the video exactly as it is written. The visuals should support and enhance the script, but the script itself should not be altered in any way.
